upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal genuinely widens the parent from one treatment-exposure misspecification/no noncompliance to dual treatment/instrument exposure misspecification with monotone take-up, and it includes the D=Z, T=S parent-reduction corner.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1: sharp ADE bounds from shared local-network completions under one misspecified treatment exposure map

published_prior_art.cite: hoshino_yanagi_2024_noncompliance_unknown_interference + schroder_oprescu_feuerriegel_kallus_2026_networks_partialid: network-IV identification/IPW and sharp misspecified-exposure bounds separately, but not the joint finite shared-completion IV bound

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1 is the parent but has no IV compliance strata or second instrumental-exposure map

published_prior_art.cite: schroder_oprescu_feuerriegel_kallus_2026_networks_partialid gives sharp treatment-exposure bounds without IV compliance; hoshino_yanagi_2024_noncompliance_unknown_interference gives IEM/noncompliance without this shared-completion sharp-set gap
imai_jiang_malani_2021_interference_noncompliance identifies complier direct/spillover effects under stratified interference but does not give this finite shared-edge incompatibility witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the flagship support-function gap is named, but Exhibit 9.1 only shows an edge-cap incompatibility and does not compute h_Tprod(u), h_T(u), u, P, or the target-pair values from Section 6 primitives.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The Savje comparator is cited only at paper level for the flagship gap; add a section/equation/page anchor tying Savje's misspecified-exposure separation to the exact dual-map nonsharpness gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The Imai-Jiang-Malani comparator is cited without a location-level anchor for the claimed four-unit witness gap; add a section/equation/page anchor for the known stratified-interference complier result being departed from.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The four-unit witness does not specify the binary encouragement design, observable cell-mean vector m(P), support direction u, product-feasible kernels, or target-pair values, so the stated positive support-function gap is not yet a fully well-posed finite instance.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proof route says to use incompatible exposure demands and a perturbation argument, but it gives no concrete separating direction, open-neighborhood parameterization, or classical separation/continuity lemma carrying the hub contradiction to an open class.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a full Exhibit 9.1 computation: choose pi_Z, observed maps, latent product kernels, bounded outcome means, a concrete observable P, and a direction u; then report numerical or symbolic values showing h_Tprod(u) > h_T(u).

Promote the hub incompatibility to an open-class statement by parameterizing a neighborhood of cell means around the witness and citing/applying a finite-polytope support-function continuity or separation lemma.

Add location-level anchors for Savje and Imai-Jiang-Malani, and state exactly which assumption or theorem each comparator lacks relative to the proposed shared completion plus monotone take-up geometry.

recommended_next_step: Revise the flagship witness into a computed support-function exhibit from Section 6 primitives; without that, the upgrade is genuine but capped below the flagship target.
